title: Deleting update reply is not supported in 2024-10

posts.author: Akash_Nad (Akash Nad)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to delete an update reply in 2024-10 or later, but it’s giving me an error.

Screenshot 2025-01-03 at 3.03.40 AM2022×870 81.5 KB

But in version 2024-07 this action is working.

Screenshot 2025-01-03 at 3.05.00 AM2008×652 58.7 KB

Can anyone confirm if Monday.com has removed that feature? It’s not mentioned in the changelog or documentation.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Akash_Nad,

Welcome to the community!

I am also getting the same error. I sent it to the team and they are investigating. I will update you when I have more info

In the mean time, would you mind opening a support ticket here to help with tracking the issue?

Best,
Rachel
